description: Assigning `not` to an OPTIONAL type does not fire E-TYPE-041 (§42). `let x: string | not = not` binds the absence value to an optional `string | not`, which is exactly where `not` is assignable, so the assignability check stays silent. The clean twin of e-type-041-not-assign-mismatch-pos.
rationale: §42 `not` IS assignable to an optional `T | not`; E-TYPE-041 fires only when the target type is non-optional.
